privileged_info_summary: The task exports video evidence from Nx Witness (a real video management system by Network Optix). The system uses port 7001 for HTTPS admin access with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Video is exported via the REST API /media endpoint in MKV format. The environment is set up with synthetic data: an incident ticket with case ID 4492 is generated pointing to a 'Parking Lot Camera' with timestamps 60 seconds in the past (30-second duration). All file paths, credentials, and API endpoints are verified against the actual implementation code and Network Optix official documentation.
